assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states PDB is the most common cause and mentions '80% of stuck node pool upgrades' are caused by PDBs

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' command to check PodDisruptionBudgets

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: checking pending pods, events with FailedScheduling, and finding bare pods without owner references

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Section 2 specifically addresses resource constraints with commands to check pending pods, scheduling events, and node resource utilization

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch command to temporarily allow 100% disruptions by setting maxUnavailable

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or automatic force-drain after 1 hour

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command to increase max-surge-upgrade and mentions checking current surge settings

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Includes section about admission webhooks blocking pod creation with commands to check validating and mutating webhook configurations

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides monitoring commands and a complete validation checklist to verify nodes are upgraded and pods are running

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention POD_PDB_VIOLATION notifications or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub for monitoring PDB-related disruption events
